acceptance_targets: [chapter_14_f02] Pass if, in the revised lake exchange from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:105 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:207, Prue has at least two turns that visibly restart, narrow, or fumble under pressure, Owen has at least one reply that sounds defensive and ordinary rather than thesis-shaped, and no more than one line in that span reads like a standalone aphorism. Fail if the conversation still reads as a sequence of fully landed moral statements.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, in the revised lake exchange from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:105 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:207, Prue has at least two turns that visibly restart, narrow, or fumble under pressure, Owen has at least one reply that sounds defensive and ordinary rather than thesis-shaped, and no more than one line in that span reads like a standalone aphorism. Fail if the conversation still reads as a sequence of fully landed moral statements.
findings.problem: The lake confrontation often lands as authored argument rather than overheard speech. Prue's strongest accusations arrive in clean, quotable formulations, and Owen's replies are likewise too thesis-ready. That pushes the chapter toward literary polish instead of pressured conversation and softens the style-bible distinction between Prue's quiet repairs and Owen's narrow, defensive literalism.
findings.rewrite_direction: Loosen the exchange in the spans beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:105, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:137, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:181. Keep Prue dry and exact, but break some of her major accusations into messier turns with interruption, restart, or partial self-correction, and let at least one of Owen's defenses at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:151 or snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:191 misfire in plainer schoolboy language instead of landing as a polished counter-position.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Preserve productive dialogue roughness; do not clean living speech into balanced thesis statements.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on dialogue realism and voice separation: idiolect fidelity, leverage shifts, pressure cadence, anti-transcript behavior, natural colloquial texture (contractions/interruptions/slang when character-true), pressure-true profanity usage per aesthetic risk policy, and preservation of productive roughness (false starts, evasions, repetitions, unfinished turns) rather than polishing speech flat.
revision_pass.label: dialogue/idiolect/cadence fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the premise's sharpest contradiction: school-year comedy, adolescent awkwardness, punitive cruelty, and cosmic dread may coexist in the same novel without canceling each other. When a scene offers a cleaner version and a truer version, choose the truer one unless the character is actively refusing perception on the page.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If pain, cruelty, fear, or moral ugliness would leave a bodily or environmental trace, render that trace instead of summarizing it into tasteful haze.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High. Contractions are the spoken norm for most characters; fuller forms are reserved for Snape, ritual language, or deliberate emphasis.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density, dialogue load, and movement mode aggressively: confrontation against quiet meals, subterranean revelation against corridor farce, ritual compression against spring drift, so no consecutive chapters feel built from the same emotional or structural template.
prose_style_profile.diction: British boarding-school realism under wartime pressure, with speculative vocabulary introduced only when Owen's attention earns it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third limited through Owen, with only brief sensory widenings that he could plausibly notice in the moment.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate analytic accumulation with blunt corporeal sentences. Quiet chapters should breathe; punishment and ritual chapters should tighten without clipping grammar.
